# Copilot instructions

## The business case
We are seeing a descrepancy of ACR for Defender for Cloud vs the overall ACR for customers. We want to be able to visualize this data in a way that allows us to identify trends and opportunities for growth in Defender for Cloud usage among our customers.

I have an excel file  in the input folder. This data is an exctract from Azure Service Level Subscription Details SL4 - WW PowerBI Dashboard. 

## Requirements
I want to be able to compare total ACR vs Defender for Cloud ACR. For example: $ACR = $145600 and output in percentage how much of that is coming from Defender for Cloud.
I want to be able to see trend lines. If certain products like Azure Virtual Desktop or General Purpose Compute are growing MoM, but defender for cloud is not, that might be an opportunity since the customer might not use defender for cloud actively. I want to do this for every customer in this overview. I need relevant information to make these calls and to followup. Help me generate the visuals, you can choose whatever format the output visuals can be, I would like to be able to drill down in the visuals however.

Eventually, I present my findings to the executive team, so I want to be able to export the visuals in a format that can be easily included in a presentation, such as PowerPoint or PDF.

## Stack
I am open to using any tools or technologies that can help me achieve these goals. I want to run it as a local web app, but perhaps in the future I can deploy it in the cloud so I can share this with other colleagues. I am open to using Python, JavaScript, or any other language that can help me achieve these goals. For now I'm using an excel file import, but in the future I might want to connect to a database or an API to get this data. I want to be able to easily update the data and see the changes reflected in the visuals.
